creator: root_dfjo1hpy@meo.ws
text:
nload crashes on my FreeBSD box every now and then with Segmentation fault (core dumped) and I don't have an idea as to why this happens.

I do however have a core dump file I can't attach here due to the file being 8MB large and the file size limit here is 1MB only.

I uploaded the file here: https://scr.meo.ws/files/2016-02-11-05-13-56-nload.core
